verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, my shepherd and only provider He makes me lie down in green pastures He leads me beside the still water He restores my soul Surely goodness and mercy will follow me All the days of my life And I will dwell in house forever Until the end of time

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, my shepherd and only provider You make me lie down in green pastures You lead me beside the still water You restore my soul Though I walk through the valley of shadows I will not be afraid (I'm not afraid) Your rod and staff are my only comfort And You'll be with me always (with me always)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You prepared a table before me In the presence of my enemies And you anoint my head with oil And my cup overflows My cup overflows with your love, with your love (Your love)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus, my shepherd and only provider You make me lie down in green pastures You lead me beside the still water You restore my soul
